conservative.name: Combustion
conservative.requirements: 3 power, target within medium range, 1 or more Bright Order spells recharging. I you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The flames of your recent spells rekindle and strike your target for Intelligence damage, +1 damage for every Bright Order spell you have recharging

boon.description: You may add or remove 1 recharge token from one of your Bright Order spells after this action is resolved

reckless.name: Combustion
reckless.requirements: 3 power, medium range to target, 1 or more Bright Order spells recharging. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The flames of your recent spells rekindle and strike your target for Intelligence damage, +1 damage for every Bright Order spell you have recharging

boon.description: Completely recharge 1 of your Bright Order spells after this action is resolved

sigmarsComet.description: Ignore the target's soak value for this attack
